The '''Cirra''' was one of the four [[akia]]s of [[Aramandi]] soceity that shared the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Aram]]. They colonized the [[Cirra system/Legends|Cirra system]], which was named after them. They were the second of the akia to settle their system.<ref name="FBS" />

The Cirra were the most militant and aggressive of the akias, always believing that they should be ready for conflict despite the fact that, by the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], there had been no inter-akia wars for generations. Members of the Cirra made up the largest percentage of volunteers to the [[Taler]], the Aramandi military forces.<ref name="FBS" />

Members of the Cirra typically dressed in loose [[Jerkin/Legends|jerkins]] and carried at least one weapon.<ref name="FBS" />

In about [[9 BBY/Legends|9 BBY]], the [[Cirra Mace]], an important artifact associated with the clan, was stolen by a [[Seelas|Seela]] and sold.

Members of the Cirra akia, notably the [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Ar'wa Nonshik]], were known to be aggressive and capable combatants.
